name: Security Headers Baseline (Cloudflare Transform Rule)
objective: Enforce a security header baseline on all responses via a Cloudflare HTTP Response Header Modification Transform Rule. Adds HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, and Content-Security-Policy (report-only mode by default).
risk_mitigated: Clickjacking, MIME-type sniffing attacks, protocol downgrade attacks, excessive referrer leakage, overly permissive browser features
potential_side_effects: HSTS max-age locks the domain to HTTPS. Do not enable includeSubDomains unless ALL subdomains serve HTTPS. The CSP header is set to report-only by default — switching to enforced mode may break apps that load third-party scripts. X-Frame-Options: DENY will break any legitimate iframeing of your content.
tuning_notes: Update the Content-Security-Policy to match your actual allowed origins. Remove X-Frame-Options if your application legitimately embeds content in iframes (use the frame-ancestors CSP directive instead). Adjust Permissions-Policy to only the browser features your app actually uses.
deployment_notes: Deploy the CSP in 'Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only' mode first and collect reports for 2-4 weeks before switching to enforced mode. HSTS can be deployed immediately if you are confident all subdomains serve HTTPS.
monitoring_notes: Set up a CSP report endpoint (e.g., via report-uri.com or your own endpoint) to collect violations. Review violations weekly to tighten the policy.

cloudflare_transform_rule.description: Security headers baseline — k1N pack v1.0

response_headers.name: Permissions-Policy
response_headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()

response_headers.name: Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only
response_headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.example.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.example.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; report-uri /csp-report
